name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
  /\ state[i] = "idle"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
  /\ state[i] = "trying"
  /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
  /\ state[i] = "critical"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages, hasn

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Each participant can be in one of the following states:
   - "Init": hasn't voted yet
   - "Yes": voted yes
   - "No": voted no
   - "Committed": committed
   - "Aborted": aborted
*)
ParticipantState == {"Init", "Yes", "No", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Coordinator can be in one of the following states:
   - "Init": hasn't decided yet
   - "Committed": committed
   - "Aborted": aborted
*)
CoordinatorState == {"Init", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Messages are tuples: [sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator},
                        receiver \in Participants \cup {coordinator},
                        type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator},
            receiver \in Participants \cup {coordinator},
            type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

(* Initial state: all participants are in "Init", coordinator in "Init", no messages *)
Init == /\ participants \in [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ coordinator \in CoordinatorState
        /\ coordinator = "Init"
        /\ messages = <<>>

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorSendPrepare ==
    /\ coordinator = "Init"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> coordinator,
                                     receiver |-> p,
                                     type |-> "Prepare"] \in Message
                         : p \in Participants)
    /\ participants' = participants
    /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes ==
    /\ \E msg \in messages :
        /\ msg.type = "Prepare"
        /\ msg.receiver \in Participants
        /\ msg.receiver \in Participants
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "Yes"]
        /\ messages' = [messages \ {msg}]
        /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes No *)
ParticipantVoteNo ==
    /\ \E msg \in messages :
        /\ msg.type = "Prepare"
        /\ msg.receiver \in Participants
        /\ msg.receiver \in Participants
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "No"]
        /\ messages' = [messages \ {msg}]
        /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Coordinator receives all Yes votes and sends Commit *)
CoordinatorSendCommit ==
    /\ coordinator = "Init"
    /\ \A p \in Participants : participants[p] = "Yes"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> coordinator,
                                     receiver |-> p,
                                     type |-> "Commit"] \in Message
                         : p \in Participants)
    /\ participants' = participants
    /\ coordinator' = "Committed"

(* Coordinator receives any No vote and sends Abort *)
CoordinatorSendAbort ==
    /\ coordinator = "Init"
    /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "No"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> coordinator,
                                     receiver |-> p,
                                     type |-> "Abort"] \in Message
                         : p \in Participants)
    /\ participants' = participants
    /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"

(* Participant receives Commit and moves to Committed *)
ParticipantCommit ==
    /\ \E msg \in messages :
        /\ msg.type = "Commit"
        /\ msg.receiver \in Participants
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "Committed"]
        /\ messages' = [messages \ {msg}]
        /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Participant receives Abort and moves to Aborted *)
ParticipantAbort ==
    /\ \E msg \in messages :
        /\ msg.type = "Abort"
        /\ msg.receiver \in Participants
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "Aborted"]
        /\ messages' = [messages \ {msg}]
        /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == CoordinatorSendPrepare
      \/ ParticipantVoteYes
      \/ ParticipantVoteNo
      \/ CoordinatorSendCommit
      \/ CoordinatorSendAbort
      \/ ParticipantCommit
      \/ ParticipantAbort

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \in [p \in Participants |-> ParticipantState]
          /\ coordinator \in CoordinatorState
          /\ messages \in Seq(Message)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Null

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[f] = p means fork f is held by philosopher p; forks[f] = Null means fork f is free *)
(* States: states[p] \in {"Thinking", "Hungry", "Eating"} *)

Init == /\ forks = [f \in 1..N |-> Null]
        /\ states = [p \in 1..N |-> "Thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher p becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : states[p] = "Thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "Hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher p picks up forks if hungry and forks are free *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N :
                /\ states[p] = "Hungry"
                /\ forks[p] = Null
                /\ forks[If(p = 1, N, p - 1)] = Null
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![p] = p, ![If(p = 1, N, p - 1)] = p]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "Eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher p puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N :
                /\ states[p] = "Eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![p] = Null, ![If(p = 1, N, p - 1)] = Null]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "Thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {Null}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"Thinking", "Hungry", "Eating"}]

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element *)
Enqueue(e) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, e)
    /\ head' = head
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ tail' = tail
    /\ size' = size - 1

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
    \/ \E e \in 1..K : Enqueue(e)
    \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
        /\ votedFor \in {None} \/ [ServerId]
        /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
       /\ votedFor = None
       /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = None
          /\ state' = "Candidate"
       \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
